strategy: Lovable mini-batch — 3 songs covering the AI vibe-coding revolution through the lens of the company Lenny is closest to. Fastest startup in Europe, professional vibe coding as a new job category, and the growth playbook rewritten for AI-native companies.

tasks.description: Song about Anton Osika and Lovable — $10M ARR in 60 days with 15 people. The fastest growing startup in Europe ever. 'The best word for a great product is that it's lovable.' Minimum lovable product → lovable product → absolutely lovable product. Building an AI software engineer that takes a prompt and gives you a working product. Read podcasts/anton-osika.md for the full conversation.

Song about Lazar Jovanovic — the world's first professional vibe coder. A new AI-era job that didn't exist a year ago. Building Chrome extensions, video generators, merch stores — all by prompting. 'Just press send.' The community that pushed what's possible past what engineers thought was impossible. Read podcasts/lazar-jovanovic.md for the full conversation.

Song about Elena Verna's growth lessons at Lovable — $200M ARR in under a year with fewer than 100 people. The growth playbook fundamentally changed for AI companies. Word of mouth is the only loop that matters. 'The only way to create a word of mouth loop is just to blow their socks off.' How product-market fit is no longer what it used to be. Read podcasts/elena-verna-40.md for the full conversation.
